creator: ml@netfence.it
text:
(In reply to Timur I. Bakeyev from comment #34)

I'm using vfs_streams_xattr on only one server and vfs_freebsd on none.
So going ahead with a samba416 port would suit 95% of my use cases.
I'll look forward to getting this on the last server, but I'd happily start testing in the meanwhile.
